author: DominicVainMod
content:
@everyone

Impact Summit - Today

Hey everyone, for those of you at home who couldn't make it to Impact Summit, we'll be streaming the entire thing. We have a lot of exciting presentations lined up for you guys so make sure you tune in if able!   

Here's a schedule of presentations, panels and chats in the GMT+8 time zone. 

The stream starts in  at 

 | https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=1c_SOsBj3Lc
